meaning: 恩尼斯基伦[英国北爱尔兰西南部城市](弗马纳郡首府)
examples: The inquest into their deaths opened yesterday in Enniskillen.
Irish Prime Minister, Enda Kenny, will attend a Remembrance Day ceremony in Enniskillen on Sunday.
The Enniskillen scheme is the first in more than 40 years to challenge segregated patterns.
Staff walked out at BT's Riverside Place building in Belfast and the telephone exchange in Enniskillen.
